headline: U.S. Postal Service to Honor Nation's 250th Anniversary With American Icons Stamps Curated by Ralph Lauren
summary: The U.S. Postal Service (USPS) today announced it will honor the nation's 250th anniversary with the release of American Icons, a collection of 13 commemorative stamps, curated by legendary American designer Ralph Lauren.
